author: lOrm
content:
Fix: src/subagent.rs

BUG: BackgroundAgentManager.agents HashMap inserted on register() but never removed; remove() existed but was uncalled by the runtime. Long sessions leaked finished BackgroundAgent Arcs (each carrying full output + task) and list() scanned all of them on every agent_output listing.

CHANGES (src/subagent.rs):
- L259 pub const FINISHED_AGENT_TTL_SECS: u64 = 60 * 60 (1h retention window).
- L281 BackgroundAgent gained finished_at: Mutex<Option<Instant>>.
- register() initializes finished_at=None and calls self.gc() to amortize sweep cost.
- finish()/fail() set finished_at=Some(Instant::now()) before flipping the finished AtomicBool.
- L400 pub fn gc(&self) -> usize { ... }: retain agents that are unfinished OR finished within TTL; returns evicted count. Poisoned-lock-safe.
- list() now gc()'s first so TUI/CLI never observes leaked stale rows.
- L426 pub fn cleanup_finished(&self) -> usize { ... }: explicit shutdown hook for tui.rs.
- L1508-1509 execute_agent_output_tool drops its local Arc then calls BACKGROUND_AGENTS.remove(agent_id) AFTER extracting result/error — consume-on-read invariant. Caller gets the output, then the entry is freed on the same call.

TESTS (4 new):
- issue422_gc_removes_finished_agents_past_ttl: backdates finished_at by TTL+1s, asserts gc()==1 and get() returns None.
- issue422_gc_keeps_in_progress_and_recently_finished_agents: running agent (finished_at=None) and a just-finished agent both survive; removed==0.
- issue422_agent_output_returns_result_then_removes_finished_entry: success path returns "the answer is 42" THEN entry vanishes; failure path returns "synthetic failure" THEN entry vanishes. Pins ordering.
- issue422_cleanup_finished_drops_finished_keeps_running: two finished (one finish, one fail) removed, one running survives.

FORENSIC VERIFICATION:
- cargo test --lib: 1318 passed; 0 failed (baseline 1314 + 4 new).
- cargo test --lib issue422: 4 passed; 0 failed.
- cargo test --lib subagent::tests: 20 passed (16 existing + 4 new), 0 failed.
- cargo clippy --all-targets --lib --tests -- -D warnings: EXIT=0.

HARD CONSTRAINTS RESPECTED:
- No #[allow(...)] in the diff.
- No edits to clippy.toml.
- No #[ignore] on any test.
- doc-paragraph clippy lint satisfied by rewriting the doc, not silencing it.
